## Summary

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run smoke -- <preview-url>` if a Cloudflare Pages preview is available
- [ ] Desktop visual QA if UI changed
- [ ] Mobile visual QA if UI changed

## Deployment Safety

- [ ] Changes are only in `grantlabs-homepage-new`
- [ ] Existing `grantlabs-website` repository was not modified
- [ ] No secrets, private keys, customer data, or deployment tokens were committed
- [ ] `DEVELOPMENT_STATUS.md` and `CHANGELOG.md` were updated for meaningful changes
- [ ] `CLAUDE_HANDOFF.md` was updated if the handoff point changed
